use_cases: Primary action button in web forms and authentication flows
Call-to-action trigger for conversions and user engagement
Interactive control in dashboards and admin panels
Submit and reset functionality in data entry interfaces
Navigation action trigger for multi-step workflows and wizards
ai_summary: A reusable, accessible button component from the Untitled UI design system, built with React Aria and Tailwind CSS. This atomic input component provides customizable variants, sizes, and states for triggering actions across web applications. Designed as a fundamental UI primitive for building complex interfaces with consistent styling and accessibility compliance.
